name: controller-harness
description: AI Controller Harness System - 7-step phase execution workflow with subagent delegation and skill codification
author: TicketPilot

installInstructions.global: Copy harness-plugin/ to ~/.claude/skills/ or install via openspec plugin install

components.name: 7-Step Phase Loop
components.description: Core workflow: Planner -> Requirements -> Implementation -> Review -> Doc Review -> Experience -> Coordination

components.name: Subagent Delegation System
components.description: Role-based task delegation: backend-engineer for code, code-reviewer for review, etc.

components.name: Fix Phase Workflow
components.description: Systematic failure handling: F1-Issue -> F2-Root Cause -> F3-Skill Codify -> F4-Fix Plan -> F5-Retry

components.name: Skill Codification System
components.description: Pattern-based learning: error -> skill entry -> reusable asset

components.name: Controller Context Management
components.description: Project state tracking, handoff protocols, compression recovery
